title: koeleria pyramidata var. ciliata
intro: Koeleria pyramidata var. ciliata, also known as a variety of Koeler's grass or small hair grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria pyramidata var. ciliata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and other holistic health practices.
